name: ChatGPT: Capture assistant artifact URL
summary: Open a ChatGPT conversation, click a named assistant artifact chip, and return the signed estuary URL without downloading it.

file_name.description: Visible assistant artifact file name, for example onboarding-plan.zip.

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const wanted=(cleanArg(arg0)||'').toLowerCase();if(!wanted)throw new Error('file_name is required');const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=(el)=>{if(!el||!(el instanceof Element))return false;const st=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return st.display!=='none'&&st.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const label=(el)=>norm([el.textContent,el.getAttribute('aria-label'),el.getAttribute('title'),el.getAttribute('download'),el.getAttribute('href')].filter(Boolean).join(' '));const captured=[];const add=(kind,url,extra={})=>{if(!url)return;captured.push({kind,url:String(url),...extra});};const ofetch=window.fetch;window.fetch=function(input,init){try{add('fetch',typeof input==='string'?input:(input&&input.url),{method:init?.method||input?.method||'GET'});}catch{}return ofetch.apply(this,arguments);};const oxopen=XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open=function(method,url){try{add('xhr',url,{method});}catch{}return oxopen.apply(this,arguments);};const owopen=window.open;window.open=function(url,name,features){try{add('window.open',url,{name:name||''});}catch{}return null;};const oaclick=HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click;HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click=function(){try{add('anchor.click',this.href,{download:this.download||'',text:label(this).slice(0,200)});}catch{}return;};const all=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a,button,[role="button"],[download]')).filter(visible);const direct=all.map((el,index)=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return{el,index,text:label(el),tag:el.tagName,href:el.getAttribute('href')||'',download:el.getAttribute('download')||'',y:r.y};}).filter(c=>{const t=c.text.toLowerCase();return (t===wanted||t.includes(wanted)||c.href.toLowerCase().includes(wanted)||c.download.toLowerCase().includes(wanted))&&c.text.length<300&&!/you said:/i.test(c.text);}).sort((a,b)=>{const ax=a.text.toLowerCase()===wanted?0:1;const bx=b.text.toLowerCase()===wanted?0:1;if(ax!==bx)return ax-bx;return b.y-a.y;});const targets=[];const seen=new Set();const push=(el,why,index)=>{if(!el||seen.has(el)||!visible(el))return;const txt=label(el);if(txt.length>500||/you said:/i.test(txt))return;seen.add(el);targets.push({el,why,index,text:txt,tag:el.tagName,href:el.getAttribute('href')||'',download:el.getAttribute('download')||'',aria:el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',testid:el.getAttribute('data-testid')||''});};for(const c of direct){push(c.el,'direct',c.index);let p=c.el.parentElement;for(let i=0;p&&i<4;i++,p=p.parentElement){for(const q of Array.from(p.querySelectorAll('a,button,[role="button"],[data-testid*="download"],[download]')).filter(visible).slice(0,25)){push(q,'nearby-'+i,c.index);}}}const clicked=[];for(const t of targets.slice(0,30)){try{t.el.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'center'});await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200));for(const evt of ['pointerover','mouseover','pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup']){t.el.dispatchEvent(new (evt.startsWith('pointer')?PointerEvent:MouseEvent)(evt,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0,view:window}));}t.el.click?.();t.el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,button:0,view:window}));clicked.push({why:t.why,tag:t.tag,text:t.text.slice(0,240),href:t.href,download:t.download,aria:t.aria,testid:t.testid});await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1200));if(captured.some(x=>/estuary\/content/.test(x.url)))break;}catch(e){clicked.push({why:t.why,tag:t.tag,error:String(e&&e.message||e)});}}await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,1800));window.fetch=ofetch;XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open=oxopen;window.open=owopen;HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click=oaclick;const signed=(captured.find(x=>/estuary\/content/.test(x.url))||{}).url||'';return{url:location.href,title:document.title,file_name:wanted,signed_url:signed,captured:captured.filter(x=>/backend-api|estuary|files/.test(x.url)).slice(0,80),clicked,direct_count:direct.length,target_count:targets.length};
